{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Jk1AJiye3SyqDGTVdkQGJD","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n    77→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    78→  if (isAuthor) {\n    79→    pendingApplicants = db\n    80→      .prepare(\n    81→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    82→         FROM listing_applications la\n    83→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    84→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    85→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    86→      )\n    87→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n    91→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    92→  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n    93→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n    94→  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n    95→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    96→    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    97→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    98→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  return NextResponse.json({\n   102→    listing: {\n   103→      ...safeListingData,\n   104→      members,\n   105→      memberCount: members.length,\n   106→      isMember,\n   107→      isAuthor,\n   108→      hasApplied,\n   109→      applicationStatus,\n   110→      pendingApplicants,\n   111→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   112→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   113→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→\n   118→export async function PATCH(\n   119→  req: NextRequest,\n   120→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   121→) {\n   122→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   123→  if (!session) {\n   124→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  const { id } = await params;\n   128→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   129→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   130→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  const listing = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   135→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   136→\n   137→  if (!listing) {\n   138→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   143→  }\n   144→\n   145→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   146→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   147→    return NextResponse.json(\n   148→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   149→      { status: 400 }\n   150→    );\n   151→  }\n   152→\n   153→  try {\n   154→    const body = await req.json();\n   155→    const {\n   156→      language,\n   157→      readingPace,\n   158→      startDate,\n   159→      meetingFormat,\n   160→      maxGroupSize,\n   161→      requiresApproval,\n   162→      platformPreference,\n   163→    } = body;\n   164→\n   165→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   166→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   167→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→    }\n   169→\n   170→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   171→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   172→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   173→      }\n   174→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   175→      if (startDate < today) {\n   176→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→      }\n   178→    }\n   179→\n   180→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   181→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   182→    }\n   183→\n   184→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   185→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   186→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   187→      }\n   188→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   189→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   190→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   191→      }\n   192→\n   193→      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n   194→      const memberCount = (db\n   195→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   196→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   197→\n   198→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   199→        return NextResponse.json(\n   200→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   201→          { status: 400 }\n   202→        );\n   203→      }\n   204→    }\n   205→\n   206→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   207→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   211→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   212→    }\n   213→\n   214→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   215→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   216→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   217→\n   218→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(language);\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   227→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   228→      values.push(startDate);\n   229→    }\n   230→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   231→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   233→    }\n   234→    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n   235→    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n   236→    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n   237→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   238→      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   239→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   240→      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n   241→      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n   242→    }\n   243→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   244→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   245→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   246→    }\n   247→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   248→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   249→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   250→    }\n   251→\n   252→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   253→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   254→    }\n   255→\n   256→    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n   257→    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n   258→\n   259→    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n   260→    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n   261→    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   262→      // Re-check platform links inside the transaction to prevent TOCTOU race:\n   263→      // a concurrent POST to /telegram or /discord could set a link between the\n   264→      // outer guard (line 146) and this point\n   265→      const current = db\n   266→        .prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link, discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   267→        .get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null; discord_link: string | null } | undefined;\n   268→      if (current?.telegram_link || current?.discord_link) {\n   269→        return { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" };\n   270→      }\n   271→\n   272→      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n   273→      const txValues = [...values];\n   274→\n   275→      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n   276→        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n   277→        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n   278→        const currentMemberCount = (db\n   279→          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   280→          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   281→\n   282→        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n   283→          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n   284→        }\n   285→\n   286→        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n   287→          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n   288→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   289→          txValues.push(1);\n   290→        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n   291→          // Group has room now — reopen it\n   292→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   293→          txValues.push(0);\n   294→        }\n   295→      }\n   296→\n   297→      txValues.push(listingId);\n   298→      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n   299→\n   300→      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n   301→      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n   302→      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n   303→        db.prepare(\n   304→          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   305→        ).run(listingId);\n   306→      }\n   307→\n   308→      return null;\n   309→    });\n   310→\n   311→    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n   312→    if (txResult?.error) {\n   313→      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n   314→    }\n   315→\n   316→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   317→  } catch (error) {\n   318→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   319→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   320→  }\n   321→}\n   322→\n   323→export async function DELETE(\n   324→  _req: NextRequest,\n   325→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   326→) {\n   327→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   328→  if (!session) {\n   329→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   330→  }\n   331→\n   332→  const { id } = await params;\n   333→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   334→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   335→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   336→  }\n   337→\n   338→  const listing = db\n   339→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   340→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   341→\n   342→  if (!listing) {\n   343→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   344→  }\n   345→\n   346→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   347→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   348→  }\n   349→\n   350→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared (initial check, re-verified inside transaction)\n   351→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   352→    return NextResponse.json(\n   353→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   354→      { status: 400 }\n   355→    );\n   356→  }\n   357→\n   358→  try {\n   359→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   360→    const members = db\n   361→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   362→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   363→\n   364→    // Delete in a transaction — re-check link guard inside to prevent TOCTOU race\n   365→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   366→      const current = db\n   367→        .prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link, discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   368→        .get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null; discord_link: string | null } | undefined;\n   369→\n   370→      if (current?.telegram_link || current?.discord_link) {\n   371→        throw new Error(\"LINK_SHARED\");\n   372→      }\n   373→\n   374→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   375→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   376→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   377→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   378→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   379→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   380→    });\n   381→\n   382→    try {\n   383→      deleteTransaction();\n   384→    } catch (txErr) {\n   385→      if (txErr instanceof Error && txErr.message === \"LINK_SHARED\") {\n   386→        return NextResponse.json(\n   387→          { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   388→          { status: 400 }\n   389→        );\n   390→      }\n   391→      throw txErr;\n   392→    }\n   393→\n   394→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   395→    for (const member of members) {\n   396→      try {\n   397→        createNotification(\n   398→          member.user_id,\n   399→          null,\n   400→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   401→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   402→        );\n   403→      } catch {\n   404→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   405→      }\n   406→    }\n   407→\n   408→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   409→  } catch (error) {\n   410→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   411→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   412→  }\n   413→}\n   414→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"911d5bf5-0318-4098-8388-7f4da98be72c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:23.024Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011gTStju15RiAigKtt5opx9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (typeof score !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(score) || score < 1 || score > 5) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment !== undefined && comment !== null && typeof comment !== \"string\") {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be a string\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (comment && typeof comment === \"string\" && comment.length > 1000) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    80→  const listing = db\n    81→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    82→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    87→      { status: 404 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    92→    return NextResponse.json(\n    93→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    94→      { status: 400 }\n    95→    );\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Verify both users are members\n    99→  const raterMember = db\n   100→    .prepare(\n   101→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   102→    )\n   103→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   104→\n   105→  if (!raterMember) {\n   106→    return NextResponse.json(\n   107→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   108→      { status: 403 }\n   109→    );\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  const ratedMember = db\n   113→    .prepare(\n   114→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   115→    )\n   116→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   117→\n   118→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json(\n   120→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   121→      { status: 400 }\n   122→    );\n   123→  }\n   124→\n   125→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   126→  const existing = db\n   127→    .prepare(\n   128→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   129→    )\n   130→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (existing) {\n   133→    db.prepare(\n   134→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   135→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   136→  } else {\n   137→    db.prepare(\n   138→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   139→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   140→\n   141→    // Notify the rated user\n   142→    createNotification(\n   143→      ratedUserId,\n   144→      listingId,\n   145→      \"rating_received\",\n   146→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   151→}\n   152→\n   153→/**\n   154→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   155→ *\n   156→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   157→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   158→ */\n   159→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   160→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   161→  if (!session) {\n   162→    return NextResponse.json(\n   163→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   164→      { status: 401 }\n   165→    );\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   169→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   176→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   177→    return NextResponse.json(\n   178→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   179→      { status: 400 }\n   180→    );\n   181→  }\n   182→\n   183→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   184→  const isMember = db\n   185→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   186→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   187→  if (!isMember) {\n   188→    return NextResponse.json(\n   189→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   190→      { status: 403 }\n   191→    );\n   192→  }\n   193→\n   194→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   195→  const givenRatings = db\n   196→    .prepare(\n   197→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   198→       FROM ratings r\n   199→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   200→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   201→    )\n   202→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   203→      rated_user_id: number;\n   204→      score: number;\n   205→      comment: string;\n   206→      display_name: string;\n   207→    }[];\n   208→\n   209→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   210→  const receivedRatings = db\n   211→    .prepare(\n   212→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   213→       FROM ratings r\n   214→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   215→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   216→    )\n   217→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   218→      rater_id: number;\n   219→      score: number;\n   220→      comment: string;\n   221→      display_name: string;\n   222→    }[];\n   223→\n   224→  return NextResponse.json({\n   225→    givenRatings,\n   226→    receivedRatings,\n   227→  });\n   228→}\n   229→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"b603487c-3cb4-4974-a551-7d888a35e0d6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:23.105Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0115ieU9zQokA9gJeW3sGeGn","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"55ef67d6-54f6-4353-a0a8-8ddd279e04b2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:23.586Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TTiwiE6QpjGjXASjNzf52m","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"0d930777-c4e5-4990-85de-07c98a117e55","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:23.693Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016FzRGN2XjyS6GR5gqp7JkQ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     5→\n     6→interface BookResult {\n     7→  key: string;\n     8→  title: string;\n     9→  author_name?: string[];\n    10→  cover_i?: number;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Props {\n    14→  onSelect: (book: {\n    15→    title: string;\n    16→    author: string;\n    17→    coverUrl: string;\n    18→    olid: string;\n    19→  }) => void;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    23→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    24→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    27→  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState(false);\n    28→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    29→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    30→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    31→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    32→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    33→\n    34→  useEffect(() => {\n    35→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    36→      if (\n    37→        containerRef.current &&\n    38→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    39→      ) {\n    40→        setOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  useEffect(() => {\n    48→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    49→      setResults([]);\n    50→      return;\n    51→    }\n    52→\n    53→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    54→    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    55→\n    56→    const controller = new AbortController();\n    57→    abortRef.current = controller;\n    58→\n    59→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    60→      setLoading(true);\n    61→      setSearchError(false);\n    62→      try {\n    63→        const res = await fetch(\n    64→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n    65→          { signal: controller.signal }\n    66→        );\n    67→        const data = await res.json();\n    68→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    69→        setOpen(true);\n    70→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n    71→      } catch (err) {\n    72→        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n    73→          setResults([]);\n    74→          setSearchError(true);\n    75→        }\n    76→      } finally {\n    77→        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n    78→          setLoading(false);\n    79→        }\n    80→      }\n    81→    }, 400);\n    82→\n    83→    return () => {\n    84→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    85→      controller.abort();\n    86→    };\n    87→  }, [query]);\n    88→\n    89→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    90→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    91→    onSelect({\n    92→      title: book.title,\n    93→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    94→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    95→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    96→        : \"\",\n    97→      olid,\n    98→    });\n    99→    setQuery(book.title);\n   100→    setOpen(false);\n   101→    setActiveIndex(-1);\n   102→  };\n   103→\n   104→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n   105→    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n   106→\n   107→    switch (e.key) {\n   108→      case \"ArrowDown\":\n   109→        e.preventDefault();\n   110→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n   111→        break;\n   112→      case \"ArrowUp\":\n   113→        e.preventDefault();\n   114→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n   115→        break;\n   116→      case \"Enter\":\n   117→        e.preventDefault();\n   118→        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n   119→          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n   120→        }\n   121→        break;\n   122→      case \"Escape\":\n   123→        setOpen(false);\n   124→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n   125→        break;\n   126→    }\n   127→  };\n   128→\n   129→  // Scroll active option into view\n   130→  useEffect(() => {\n   131→    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n   132→      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n   133→      if (activeEl) {\n   134→        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n   135→      }\n   136→    }\n   137→  }, [activeIndex]);\n   138→\n   139→  const activeDescendant =\n   140→    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n   141→      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n   142→      : undefined;\n   143→\n   144→  return (\n   145→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n   146→      <input\n   147→        type=\"text\"\n   148→        className=\"input-field\"\n   149→        value={query}\n   150→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n   151→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n   152→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n   153→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n   154→        role=\"combobox\"\n   155→        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n   156→        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n   157→        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   158→        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n   159→        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n   160→        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n   161→      />\n   162→      {loading && (\n   163→        <div\n   164→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n   165→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   166→          role=\"status\"\n   167→          aria-live=\"polite\"\n   168→        >\n   169→          Searching...\n   170→        </div>\n   171→      )}\n   172→\n   173→      {searchError && !loading && (\n   174→        <div\n   175→          className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n   176→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-error, #dc2626)\" }}\n   177→          role=\"alert\"\n   178→        >\n   179→          Book search is unavailable. Please try again later.\n   180→        </div>\n   181→      )}\n   182→\n   183→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   184→        <div\n   185→          ref={listboxRef}\n   186→          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   187→          role=\"listbox\"\n   188→          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n   189→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   190→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   191→        >\n   192→          {results.map((book, index) => (\n   193→            <div\n   194→              key={book.key}\n   195→              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n   196→              role=\"option\"\n   197→              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n   198→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   199→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   200→              style={{\n   201→                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n   202→              }}\n   203→            >\n   204→              {book.cover_i ? (\n   205→                <Image\n   206→                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n   207→                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n   208→                  width={32}\n   209→                  height={48}\n   210→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n   211→                />\n   212→              ) : (\n   213→                <div\n   214→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n   215→                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n   216→                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   217→                >\n   218→                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n   219→                </div>\n   220→              )}\n   221→              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n   222→                <div\n   223→                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n   224→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   225→                >\n   226→                  {book.title}\n   227→                </div>\n   228→                <div\n   229→                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n   230→                  style={{\n   231→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   232→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   233→                  }}\n   234→                >\n   235→                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n   236→                </div>\n   237→              </div>\n   238→            </div>\n   239→          ))}\n   240→        </div>\n   241→      )}\n   242→    </div>\n   243→  );\n   244→}\n   245→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"1b978bdd-6267-4e92-be6a-3b562a27f590","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:27.457Z"}

function CreateListingPage() {\n     9→  const router = useRouter();\n    10→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    11→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    12→\n    13→  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n    14→  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n    15→  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n    16→  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n    17→  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n    18→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    19→  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n    20→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n    21→  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n    22→  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n    23→  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n    24→\n    25→  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    26→    title: string;\n    27→    author: string;\n    28→    coverUrl: string;\n    29→    olid: string;\n    30→  }) => {\n    31→    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    32→    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    33→    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    34→    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n    35→  };\n    36→\n    37→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    38→    e.preventDefault();\n    39→    setError(\"\");\n    40→    setLoading(true);\n    41→\n    42→    try {\n    43→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n    44→        method: \"POST\",\n    45→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    46→        body: JSON.stringify({\n    47→          bookTitle,\n    48→          bookAuthor,\n    49→          bookCoverUrl,\n    50→          bookOlid,\n    51→          language,\n    52→          readingPace,\n    53→          startDate,\n    54→          meetingFormat,\n    55→          maxGroupSize,\n    56→          requiresApproval,\n    57→          platformPreference,\n    58→        }),\n    59→      });\n    60→\n    61→      const data = await res.json();\n    62→\n    63→      if (!res.ok) {\n    64→        if (res.status === 401) {\n    65→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    66→          return;\n    67→        }\n    68→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n    69→        return;\n    70→      }\n    71→\n    72→      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    73→    } catch {\n    74→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    75→    } finally {\n    76→      setLoading(false);\n    77→    }\n    78→  };\n    79→\n    80→  return (\n    81→    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n    82→      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Start a reading group</h1>\n    83→      <p\n    84→        className=\"mb-6 sm:mb-8\"\n    85→        style={{\n    86→          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n    87→          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n    88→          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n    89→        }}\n    90→      >\n    91→        Choose a book, set your pace, and wait for readers to join.\n    92→      </p>\n    93→\n    94→      {error && (\n    95→        <div\n    96→          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n    97→          style={{\n    98→            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n    99→            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n   100→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   101→          }}\n   102→          role=\"alert\"\n   103→        >\n   104→          {error}\n   105→        </div>\n   106→      )}\n   107→\n   108→      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n   109→        <div>\n   110→          <label\n   111→            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n   112→            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   113→          >\n   114→            Book\n   115→          </label>\n   116→          <BookSearch onSelect={handleBookSelect} />\n   117→          {bookTitle && (\n   118→            <div\n   119→              className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg\"\n   120→              style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\" }}\n   121→            >\n   122→              {bookCoverUrl && (\n   123→                <Image\n   124→                  src={bookCoverUrl}\n   125→                  alt={`Cover of ${bookTitle}`}\n   126→                  width={40}\n               >\n   137→                  {bookTitle}\n   138→                </div>\n   139→                <div\n   140→                  className=\"text-xs\"\n   141→                  style={{\n            by {bookAuthor}\n   147→                </div>\n   148→              </div>\n   149→            </div>\n   150→          )}\n   151→        </div>\n   152→\n   153→        <div>\n   154→          <label\n   155→            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n   156→            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   157→          >\n   158→            Discussion language\n   159→          </label>\n   160→          <select\n   161→            className=\"input-field\"\n   162→            value={language}\n   163→            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n   164→          >\n   165→            <option>English</option>\n   166→            <option>Spanish</option>\n   167→            <option>French</option>\n   168→  </div>\n   178→\n   179→        <div>\n   180→          <label\n   181→            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n   182→            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   183→          >\n   184→            Reading pace\n   185→          </label>\n   186→          <input\n   187→            type=\"text\"\n   188→            className=\"input-field\"\n   189→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SsGZZWrJEGBT7FagKpPm9c","type":"tool_result","content":"---\ntitle: Failed to find Server Action\nurl: \"https://nextjs.org/docs/messages/failed-to-find-server-action\"\n---\n\n\n## Why This Message Occurred\n\nFor security purposes, Next.js creates encrypted, non-deterministic keys (IDs) to allow for the client to reference and call the [Server Action](/docs/app/getting-started/mutating-data). These keys are periodically recalculated between builds for enhanced security.\n\nWhen self-hosting your Next.js application across multiple servers, each server instance may end up with a different encryption key, leading to potential inconsistencies.\n\n## Possible Ways to Fix It\n\nTo mitigate this, you can overwrite the encryption key using the `process.env.NEXT_SERVER_ACTIONS_ENCRYPTION_KEY` environment variable. Specifying this variable ensures that your encryption keys are persistent across builds, and all server instances use the same key.\n\nThe key must be a base64-encoded value with a valid AES key length (16, 24, or 32 bytes). Set this variable at **build time**—the key is embedded in the build output and used automatically at runtime.\n\nIf you are deploying your Next.js application to Vercel, you can use the feature [Skew Protection](https://vercel.com/docs/deployments/skew-protection) to ensure assets and functions from the previous version are still available, even after a new version is deployed.\n\n## Useful Links\n\n- [Server Actions - Security](/docs/app/guides/data-security)\n- [Overwriting encryption keys (advanced)](/docs/app/guides/data-security#overwriting-encryption-keys-advanced)"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_013tZ4WEztKgnyZ3vKduPEXy","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"f61442ad-afb1-43ef-9f6b-18b7dbd30c76","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:29.673Z"}

useCallback } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Member {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: number;\n    17→  display_name: string;\n    18→  bio: string;\n    19→  applied_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→interface Listing {\n    23→  id: number;\n    24→  author_id: number;\n    25→  book_title: string;\n    26→  book_author: string;\n    27→  book_cover_url: string;\n    28→  language: string;\n    29→  reading_pace: string;\n    30→  start_date: string;\n    31→  meeting_format: string;\n    32→  max_group_size: number;\n    33→  telegram_link: string;\n    34→  is_full: number;\n    35→  requires_approval: number;\n    36→  created_at: string;\n    37→  author_name: string;\n    38→  members: Member[];\n    39→  memberCount: number;\n    40→  isMember: boolean;\n    41→  isAuthor: boolean;\n    42→  hasApplied: boolean;\n    43→  applicationStatus: string;\n    44→  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n    45→  currentUserId: number | null;\n    46→  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n    47→  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n    48→  platform_preference: string;\n    49→  discord_link: string;\n    50→}\n    51→\n    52→export default function ListingDetail() {\n    53→  const { id } = useParams();\n    54→  const router = useRouter();\n    55→  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n    56→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    57→  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n    58→  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n    59→  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    60→  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    61→  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    64→  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    65→  // Discord state\n    66→  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    67→  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n    68→  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n    69→  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    70→  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    71→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    72→\n    73→  // Rating state\n    74→  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n    75→  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n    76→  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n    77→  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    78→  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    79→\n    80→  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n    81→\n    82→  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n    83→  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n    84→  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n    85→\n    86→  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    89→      const data = await res.json();\n    90→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    91→        setListing(data.listing);\n    92→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    93→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    94→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    95→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    96→      } else {\n    97→        setFetchError(true);\n    98→      }\n    99→    } catch {\n   100→      setFetchError(true);\n   101→    } finally {\n   102→      setLoading(false);\n   103→    }\n   104→  }, [id]);\n   105→\n   106→  useEffect(() => {\n   107→    fetchListing();\n   108→  }, [fetchListing]);\n   109→\n   110→  const handleDelete = async () => {\n   111→    setDeleting(true);\n   112→    setError(\"\");\n   113→    try {\n   114→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n   115→      const data = await res.json();\n   116→      if (res.ok) {\n   117→        router.push(\"/\");\n   118→      } else {\n   119→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to delete listing\");\n   120→        setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   121→      }\n   122→    } catch {\n   123→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n   124→      setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   125→    } finally {\n   126→      setDeleting(false);\n   127→    }\n   128→  };\n   129→\n   130→  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n   131→    if (!id) return;\n   132→    try {\n   133→      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n   134→      const data = await res.json();\n   135→      if (data.givenRatings) {\n   136→        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n   137→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   138→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   139→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   140→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   141→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   142→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   143→        }\n   144→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   145→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   146→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   147→      }\n   148→    } catch {\n   149→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   150→    }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"6ea7e8bc-475d-4584-bd98-5222206ef469","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:30.704Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AQTtDV2upCSRK6GU8ghPGY","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  // Type-check before string operations to prevent TypeError on non-string input\n    14→  if (typeof displayName !== \"string\") {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→  if (bio !== undefined && typeof bio !== \"string\") {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    34→    displayName.trim(),\n    35→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    36→    session.userId\n    37→  );\n    38→\n    39→  // Update session\n    40→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    41→  await session.save();\n    42→\n    43→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    44→}\n    45→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"6a8f33ae-1ee5-49fa-b79d-7baecd45be1c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:31.588Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QyPUHNwG1ZzU23d7MA4fwN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import type { MetadataRoute } from \"next\";\n     2→\n     3→const BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL || \"http://89.167.127.85:3000\";\n     4→\n     5→export default function robots(): MetadataRoute.Robots {\n     6→  return {\n     7→    rules: [\n     8→      {\n     9→        userAgent: \"*\",\n    10→        allow: \"/\",\n    11→        disallow: [\"/api/\", \"/auth/\", \"/profile\", \"/notifications\"],\n    12→      },\n    13→    ],\n    14→    sitemap: `${BASE_URL}/sitemap.xml`,\n    15→  };\n    16→}\n    17→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_013tZ4WEztKgnyZ3vKduPEXy","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"4e44a9d8-6078-4190-ac71-0817e6677441","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:34.150Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CZXBXfWimHTEDno8vgXeY9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import type { MetadataRoute } from \"next\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL || \"http://89.167.127.85:3000\";\n     5→\n     6→export default function sitemap(): MetadataRoute.Sitemap {\n     7→  const staticPages: MetadataRoute.Sitemap = [\n     8→    {\n     9→      url: BASE_URL,\n    10→      lastModified: new Date(),\n    11→      changeFrequency: \"daily\",\n    12→      priority: 1.0,\n    13→    },\n    14→    {\n    15→      url: `${BASE_URL}/auth/login`,\n    16→      lastModified: new Date(),\n    17→      changeFrequency: \"monthly\",\n    18→      priority: 0.5,\n    19→    },\n    20→    {\n    21→      url: `${BASE_URL}/auth/register`,\n    22→      lastModified: new Date(),\n    23→      changeFrequency: \"monthly\",\n    24→      priority: 0.5,\n    25→    },\n    26→    {\n    27→      url: `${BASE_URL}/listings/create`,\n    28→      lastModified: new Date(),\n    29→      changeFrequency: \"monthly\",\n    30→      priority: 0.7,\n    31→    },\n    32→  ];\n    33→\n    34→  // Add open listing pages\n    35→  const listings = db\n    36→    .prepare(\n    37→      `SELECT id, created_at FROM listings WHERE is_full = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC`\n    38→    )\n    39→    .all() as { id: number; created_at: string }[];\n    40→\n    41→  const listingPages: MetadataRoute.Sitemap = listings.map((listing) => ({\n    42→    url: `${BASE_URL}/listings/${listing.id}`,\n    43→    lastModified: new Date(listing.created_at),\n    44→    changeFrequency: \"daily\" as const,\n    45→    priority: 0.8,\n    46→  }));\n    47→\n    48→  return [...staticPages, ...listingPages];\n    49→}\n    50→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_013tZ4WEztKgnyZ3vKduPEXy","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"526562c5-6ad9-4007-b0b1-33a33276a911","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:34.714Z"}

Match, group up, and discuss on Telegram.\",\n     9→  openGraph: {\n    10→    title: \"Bookmate — Find Your Reading Companion\",\n    11→    description:\n    12→      \"Find people who want to read the same book at the same pace. Match, group up, and discuss on Telegram.\",\n    13→    type: \"website\",\n    14→    siteName: \"Bookmate\",\n    15→  },\n    16→  twitter: {\n    17→    card: \"summary\",\n    18→    title: \"Bookmate — Find Your Reading Companion\",\n    19→    description:\n    20→      \"Find people who want to read the same book at the same pace. Match, group up, and discuss on Telegram.\",\n    21→  },\n    22→};\n    23→\n    24→export default function RootLayout({\n    25→  children,\n    26→}: {\n    27→  children: React.ReactNode;\n    28→}) {\n    29→  return (\n    30→    <html lang=\"en\">\n    31→      <body className=\"min-h-screen\">\n    32→        <a href=\"#main-content\" className=\"skip-link\">\n    33→          Skip to content\n    34→        </a>\n    35→        <Navbar />\n    36→        <main id=\"main-content\" className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 py-4 sm:py-8\">{children}</main>\n    37→      </body>\n    38→    </html>\n    39→  );\n    40→}\n    41→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_013tZ4WEztKgnyZ3vKduPEXy","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"79428912-822a-477d-a731-4ffcc1d80480","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:34.796Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0115Mdgagsz8pPR45eBvFVCU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import db from \"./db\";\n     2→import { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n     3→import { escapeHtmlForEmail } from \"./crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→function getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n     6→  const user = db\n     7→    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n     8→    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n     9→  return user?.email || null;\n    10→}\n    11→\n    12→export function createNotification(\n    13→  userId: number,\n    14→  listingId: number | null,\n    15→  type: string,\n    16→  message: string\n    17→) {\n    18→  db.prepare(\n    19→    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    20→  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n    21→\n    22→  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n    23→  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n    24→  if (email) {\n    25→    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    26→    // HTML-escape the message to prevent injection via user-controlled content\n    27→    // (display names, book titles) embedded in notification messages\n    28→    const htmlBody = `<p>${escapeHtmlForEmail(message)}</p>`;\n    29→    sendEmail(email, subject, message, htmlBody).catch(() => {\n    30→      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    31→    });\n    32→  }\n    33→}\n    34→\n    35→function getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n    36→  switch (type) {\n    37→    case \"new_member\":\n    38→      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    39→    case \"group_full\":\n    40→      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    41→    case \"application_received\":\n    42→      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    43→    case \"application_approved\":\n    44→      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    45→    case \"application_rejected\":\n    46→      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    47→    case \"rating_received\":\n    48→      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    49→    case \"listing_deleted\":\n    50→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    51→    case \"listing_updated\":\n    52→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    53→    case \"telegram_ready\":\n    54→      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    55→    case \"discord_ready\":\n    56→      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    57→    default:\n    58→      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n    59→  }\n    60→}\n    61→\n    62→export function notifyListingAuthor(\n    63→  listingId: number,\n    64→  joinerName: string\n    65→) {\n    66→  const listing = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    69→    )\n    70→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    71→\n    72→  if (listing) {\n    73→    createNotification(\n    74→      listing.author_id,\n    75→      listingId,\n    76→      \"new_member\",\n    77→      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    78→    );\n    79→  }\n    80→}\n    81→\n    82→export function notifyApplicationReceived(\n    83→  listingId: number,\n    84→  applicantName: string\n    85→) {\n    86→  const listing = db\n    87→    .prepare(\n    88→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    89→    )\n    90→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    91→\n    92→  if (listing) {\n    93→    createNotification(\n    94→      listing.author_id,\n    95→      listingId,\n    96→      \"application_received\",\n    97→      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    98→    );\n    99→  }\n   100→}\n   101→\n   102→export function notifyApplicationDecision(\n   103→  userId: number,\n   104→  listingId: number,\n   105→  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n   106→) {\n   107→  const listing = db\n   108→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   109→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n   110→\n   111→  if (listing) {\n   112→    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n   113→    const message =\n   114→      decision === \"approved\"\n   115→        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n   116→        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n   117→    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n   118→  }\n   119→}\n   120→\n   121→/**\n   122→ * Notify all members that the group is full.\n   123→ * Accepts listing data as parameters to avoid re-querying outside the\n   124→ * join transaction (which could return stale platform_preference if\n   125→ * a concurrent PATCH changed it between the transaction commit and this call).\n   126→ */\n   127→export function notifyGroupFull(\n   128→  listingId: number,\n   129→  bookTitle: string,\n   130→  platformPreference: string\n   131→) {\n   132→  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n   133→  const members = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   135→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   136→\n   137→  const platform = platformPreference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n   138→  const botConfigured = platformPreference === \"discord\"\n   139→    ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n   140→    : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n   141→  const message = botConfigured\n   142→    ? `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n   143→    : `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n   144→\n   145→  for (const member of members) {\n   146→    createNotification(\n   147→      member.user_id,\n   148→      listingId,\n   149→      \"group_full\",\n   150→      message\n   151→    );\n   152→  }\n   153→}\n   154→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"899c3460-0172-4059-942c-5ad8819b7ca1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:35.379Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019rX4WcTNNyvQGogiSSg8HD","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\n    15→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    16→const globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\n    17→if (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n    18→  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    19→    const now = Date.now();\n    20→    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    21→      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    22→      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    23→        store.delete(key);\n    24→      }\n    25→    }\n    26→  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    27→}\n    28→\n    29→/**\n    30→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    31→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    32→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    33→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    34→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    35→ */\n    36→export function checkRateLimit(\n    37→  key: string,\n    38→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    39→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    40→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    41→  const now = Date.now();\n    42→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    43→\n    44→  if (!entry) {\n    45→    // Prevent unbounded memory growth under attack\n    46→    if (store.size > 50_000) {\n    47→      return { allowed: false, retryAfter: 60 };\n    48→    }\n    49→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    50→    store.set(key, entry);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    54→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    55→\n    56→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    57→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    58→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    59→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    60→  }\n    61→\n    62→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    63→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    64→}\n    65→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"d3bccc95-3fcf-420c-b8d5-463acf563aba","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:35.674Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FcUXxwH8cPgR5FgjV9KjPR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read — use subquery with LIMIT to bound WAL lock duration\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      `UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1\n    54→       WHERE id IN (\n    55→         SELECT id FROM notifications\n    56→         WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\n    57→         LIMIT 1000\n    58→       )`\n    59→    ).run(session.userId);\n    60→  }\n    61→\n    62→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    63→}\n    64→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_018sx9Gjuwvs6L2MJxb9ozeZ","session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"39b1a785-8208-4237-bb32-6803f3495eb0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:01:35.987Z"}
