{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_012T7hXEwKag24zfi5W4Uu7P","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Pm3swSWQ4qG8huGCdUChJQ","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: session destroy, PATCH body, abort leak, block probes (#108)\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- **Await `session.destroy()`** — deleted user's cookie was never cleared because the async call wasn't awaited\n- **PATCH /api/notifications body validation** — `req.json()` threw unhandled error on missing/malformed body (500 → now 400)\n- **BookSearch abort leak** — in-flight fetch not aborted when query shortened below 3 chars\n- **Middleware blocks `Next-Action` header probes** — bots sending `Next-Action: x` caused repeated PM2 error logs; app uses zero server actions so all such requests are illegitimate\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] All 202 tests pass (1 new test for PATCH body validation)\n- [x] ESLint clean\n- [x] Build succeeds with middleware compiled\n- [ ] Verify PM2 error logs stop showing \"Failed to find Server Action\" after deploy\n\nCloses #108\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Create pull request"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":248,"cache_read_input_tokens":39542,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":248},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"bc0efa7e-8703-4eb4-b43b-501b2d7bed39"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Jw3CqXyGdmgUuUu4dUXxrE","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01X3as7KPMs8hbPyrUJkwss5","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-1400.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 14:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 17: fixed 3 bugs (session destroy not awaited, PATCH body crash, BookSearch abort leak) and added middleware to block bot server action probes. Created issue #108, implemented fixes in PR #109, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 202 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry ~3 days), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n- **PM2 logs**: Recurring \"Failed to find Server Action 'x'\" errors from bot probes — fixed with middleware\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #108: Code review round 17 (PR #109 — merged + deployed)\n\n4 fixes:\n\n1. **`session.destroy()` not awaited** (IMPORTANT) — Deleted user's cookie never actually cleared on client side because `destroy()` returns a Promise that wasn't awaited. Fixed with `await`.\n\n2. **PATCH /api/notifications crashes on missing body** (IMPORTANT) — `req.json()` threw unhandled SyntaxError when body is missing/malformed, producing 500 instead of 400. Fixed with try/catch wrapper. Added test.\n\n3. **BookSearch abort leak on early return** (IMPORTANT) — In-flight fetch not aborted when query shortened below 3 chars, causing potential state update on unmounted component. Fixed by aborting on early return path.\n\n4. **Middleware blocks server action probes** (HARDENING) — Bots sending `Next-Action: x` header caused repeated PM2 error logs. App uses zero server actions, so added middleware to return 400. Verified working in production.\n\nAll 202 tests pass (1 new), ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Critical — needs-human, ~3 days remaining\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance optimization, or new feature proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":194,"cache_read_input_tokens":42447,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":194},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"e2c55a4e-757c-47c8-9eca-0b6a8d57b71d"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01X3as7KPMs8hbPyrUJkwss5","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-1400.md"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"44965efa-bd8f-49a5-97b6-4aebd448e0a9","timestamp":"2026-03-24T14:08:24.799Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-1400.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 14:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 17: fixed 3 bugs (session destroy not awaited, PATCH body crash, BookSearch abort leak) and added middleware to block bot server action probes. Created issue #108, implemented fixes in PR #109, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 202 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry ~3 days), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n- **PM2 logs**: Recurring \"Failed to find Server Action 'x'\" errors from bot probes — fixed with middleware\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #108: Code review round 17 (PR #109 — merged + deployed)\n\n4 fixes:\n\n1. **`session.destroy()` not awaited** (IMPORTANT) — Deleted user's cookie never actually cleared on client side because `destroy()` returns a Promise that wasn't awaited. Fixed with `await`.\n\n2. **PATCH /api/notifications crashes on missing body** (IMPORTANT) — `req.json()` threw unhandled SyntaxError when body is missing/malformed, producing 500 instead of 400. Fixed with try/catch wrapper. Added test.\n\n3. **BookSearch abort leak on early return** (IMPORTANT) — In-flight fetch not aborted when query shortened below 3 chars, causing potential state update on unmounted component. Fixed by aborting on early return path.\n\n4. **Middleware blocks server action probes** (HARDENING) — Bots sending `Next-Action: x` header caused repeated PM2 error logs. App uses zero server actions, so added middleware to return 400. Verified working in production.\n\nAll 202 tests pass (1 new), ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Critical — needs-human, ~3 days remaining\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance optimization, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01RXnkQS1jTNSNujKRZ3859d","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Session Complete ✅\n\n**What I did this session:**\n\n1. **READ & REVIEW** — Loaded context, checked production (healthy, HTTP 200, PM2 online), reviewed open issues (2 `needs-human`), confirmed all approved work is done. Noticed recurring \"Failed to find Server Action 'x'\" errors in PM2 logs.\n\n2. **Investigated server action errors** — Confirmed the app uses zero server actions. These are bot/scanner probes sending `Next-Action: x` headers. Added middleware to return 400 and silence the noise.\n\n3. **Code review round 17** (Issue #108, PR #109) — Found and fixed 3 bugs:\n   - **`session.destroy()` not awaited** — deleted user's cookie was never cleared client-side\n   - **PATCH /api/notifications** — unhandled crash on missing/malformed body (500 → 400)\n   - **BookSearch abort leak** — in-flight fetch not cancelled on query shortening\n\n4. **Deployed** — All 202 tests pass, CI green, merged, deployed. Verified middleware blocks probes in production (`curl` with `Next-Action: x` → 400).\n\n**Monitoring:** PAT expiry issue #54 (~3 days remaining, needs human action)."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":271,"cache_read_input_tokens":43374,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":271},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"df8e3316-4a3d-4661-adeb-90ad5384c19b","uuid":"d8f6f8b4-fac6-4377-9d51-27cdd10a5b29"}
